name: Break the exchanges.ts ⇄ exchange-prompts type cycle (extract ExchangeContext to exchange-types.ts)
description: Forward edge exchanges.ts:37-41 → exchange-prompts.ts is a runtime value import; closing edges exchange-prompts.ts:19 and language-prompts.ts:3 are `import type { ExchangeContext }` (compile-erased, no TDZ risk). Approved cut: move ExchangeContext + local type deps (ExchangeSourceEvidence, PreferredLlmProvider, LlmProviderPolicy, InputMode, ConversationLanguage; ~40 fields incl llmTier/birthYear/learnerName) to exchange-types.ts; re-point importers. CUTOVER NOTE: exchanges.ts/exchange-prompts.ts were CUT-B1 scope (now closed); correctness-safe (type-only); minor merge-coordination if WI-586 re-points exchanges.ts — land promptly.
acceptanceCriteria: ExchangeContext (+ its local type deps) extracted to apps/api/src/services/exchange-types.ts; exchanges.ts, exchange-prompts.ts, language-prompts.ts, session-exchange.ts all import the type from there; both type-only cycles (#7 exchanges⇄exchange-prompts, #8 via language-prompts) eliminated. api typecheck + eval harness green; no runtime change (type-only move).
